title: Implement parallel transcription pipeline in API process route
description: Modify the background processing route to split the downloaded file, process chunks through the Gemini Files API, poll for ACTIVE states, transcribe each chunk, and write segments to `transcript_chunks` table.
acceptanceCriteria: API process route handler splits audio into 30-second segments.
Chunks are uploaded to the Gemini Files API and polled until they are ACTIVE.
Each chunk's transcript is inserted into `public.transcript_chunks` with correct index and timestamps.
Errors in individual chunk processing are handled without failing the entire meeting immediately.

steps.description: Integrate audio splitter in API process route
steps.details: Import the helper from `src/lib/audioSplitter.ts` in `src/app/api/process/route.ts` and slice files after downloading from storage.
Implement batch uploads and polls to Gemini Files API. Restrict batch size or concurrency to avoid rate limits.
Perform inserts into `transcript_chunks` table for each chunk once completed.

technicalNotes: Use Promise.all or a custom queue/concurrency pool (e.g. p-limit) to avoid triggering rate limit errors on the Gemini API.
